channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Wildlife recovery in Chornobyl highlights complex legacy of nuclear disaster
item.description: Nearly four decades after the Chornobyl nuclear disaster, the exclusion zone remains heavily contaminated with radioactive materials such as caesium-137, plutonium and americium. Despite these hazards...

item.title: A Fully Randomized 2026 NFL Mock Draft Experiment and Its Most Realistic Fits
item.description: This article presents a lighthearted and unconventional take on the 2026 NFL Draft through a fully randomized mock draft. Created by Pride of Detroit’s Jeremy Reisman, the exercise continues a 13-year...

item.title: Pakistan to Gradually Transition National Transport to Electric Vehicles
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif on Thursday emphasised the need to gradually shift Pakistan’s transport sector to electric vehicles (EVs) as part of a broader energy security and sustainable development...

item.title: Trump Directs US Navy to Use Lethal Force Against Vessels Laying Mines in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: In a recent escalation of tensions in the Strait of Hormuz, President Donald Trump issued a direct order to the US Navy via a Truth Social post. He commanded forces to 'shoot and kill any boat, small ...

item.title: No Evidence Found for Mass Graves in Kondo, Kunduchi, Commission Reports
item.description: The Commission of Inquiry into the October 29, 2025 post-election violence has dismissed the allegations of mass graves in Kondo, Kunduchi, Dar es Salaam. Following extensive investigations, including...

item.title: Concerns Raised Over Legality and Effectiveness of Tree Protection Committee in Hyderabad
item.description: Environmental activists in Hyderabad have raised serious concerns about the legal standing and effectiveness of the Tree Protection Committee (TPC) functioning in Hyderabad and Rangareddy districts. T...

item.title: Honda to withdraw from South Korean car market amid shifting global automotive conditions
item.description: Honda has announced that it will discontinue its automobile sales operations in South Korea by the end of 2026, marking a significant strategic withdrawal from a key Asian market. The Japanese car man...

item.title: PSX KSE-100 drops over 2,400 points amid geopolitical tensions and weak sentiment
item.description: The Pakistan Stock Exchange (PSX) witnessed a continued bearish trend on Thursday as the benchmark KSE-100 index dropped significantly, falling below the 170,000-point mark. The index declined by 2,40...

item.title: Armed robbery in Elmira leaves two victims shaken
item.description: In a shocking incident in Elmira, Ontario, two individuals were robbed at gunpoint on the evening of April 23, 2026. The suspects, who remain at large, threatened the victims with a firearm and took p...

item.title: Conflicts of Interest in IMF’s Role as Privileged Creditor Arbiter
item.description: Di IMF dey benefit from privileged creditor status, but e no suppose dey act as judge for other lenders. Di status mean say IMF dey get priority to collect money if country wey borrow money get financ...

item.title: UK Biobank data of 500,000 participants briefly listed online in China
item.description: The UK government has confirmed that the health data of 500,000 participants in the UK Biobank project were briefly offered for sale on the Chinese e-commerce platform Alibaba. Technology Minister Ian...

item.title: Sakaja to Resolve Single Mothers Association's 35-Year Land Dispute
item.description: Nairobi Governor Johnson Sakaja has promised to grant the Single Mothers Association of Kenya (SMAK) legal ownership of a 0.2-hectare piece of land after their prolonged 35-year struggle. The associat...

item.title: Anne Hathaway joins co-stars for BBC interview after attending two major red carpet events for The Devil Wears Prada 2
item.description: Anne Hathaway, along with her co-stars from 'The Devil Wears Prada 2', visited the BBC Radio 2 studios for an interview with Breakfast Show host Gary Davies, just hours after attending two major red c...

item.title: Ontario man pleads guilty to sexual offences against minors
item.description: An Ontario man has pleaded guilty to charges of sexual interference after preying on girls aged 13 to 15 when he was 21 years old. The case, which has garnered significant attention, highlights the di...

item.title: High voter turnout recorded in West Bengal and Tamil Nadu during Assembly elections amid tensions and voter roll concerns
item.description: Voting for the Assembly elections took place on Thursday across all 234 constituencies in Tamil Nadu and in 152 out of 294 seats in West Bengal during the first phase. As per Election Commission data,...

item.title: Kenya Plans Investment in Uganda's Oil Refinery Following KPC IPO
item.description: During the Africa We Build Summit 2026 held in Nairobi, President William Ruto urged African leaders to shift focus from foreign aid to investing locally. He highlighted that Africa produces around 10...

item.title: Davao Rap Group Delinquent Society Returns to Rappler Live Jam
item.description: MANILA, Philippines – Hip-hop collective Delinquent Society is set to return to Rappler Live Jam on April 23 at 8 pm, marking another appearance for the Davao City-based group on the platform. Formed ...

item.title: Fatal Emmarentia road rage highlights violence and gun risks in SA
item.description: The recent road rage incident in Emmarentia has tragically illustrated South Africa's deepening culture of violence and aggression. Faisel Ul Rhehman, a 48-year-old husband and father, was shot dead d...

item.title: Transport disruptions resolved, Attock Refinery resumes normal operations after road access restored
item.description: Attock Oil Refinery (ARL) has resumed normal operations after the restoration of road transport links that had earlier been disrupted due to security-related road closures in Islamabad. The refinery m...

item.title: Grindr Expands Lobbying Efforts and Political Influence in Washington and California
item.description: Grindr, the LGBTQ+ dating app, has significantly expanded its political presence in Washington, D.C., and California since Donald Trump’s return to the presidency. The company is actively building inf...
